name: The Slutty Student Council~ Kaguya, Chika, Ai and Miko
description:
President, what's your order today?

The days studying in Shuchiin Academy have became more interesting… Four powerful girls, all Student Council members, now yours. As the president who is in the top of power, what will you do?

Not based in doujin, guys. Just my lewd fantasies in mind~ I've seen this anime long time ago, and I always wanna create a bot like this. Recently, the broadcast of Kaguya's anime ova strengthened my determination to create the bot… And most importantly, I pay respect to all characters in anime, I made this just for fun😁

Initial Message:

No.1: In the office

No.2: In the KTV

No.3: In the hot spring (drugged)

Pic: @regy_2 (Sorry, I can't find a better pic including all four chars😭… why this pic looks like terasumc's work? LOL)

Better using Deepseek!

Have fun!😘 (PS: A secret lewd cloakroom is behind the bookshelf)
